title: TotemTweak
description: Transform totem mechanics - Make totems exclusive to strongholds with configurable drop rates!
body:
TotemTweak - Revolutionize totem of undying mechanics on your server!

This plugin prevents totem of undying drops from entities and adds them exclusively to stronghold chests with configurable chances. Perfect for servers that want to make totems more valuable and encourage exploration.


🌟 Features:

• Prevents totem drops from evokers, raids, and other sources

• Adds totems to stronghold chests (0-100% configurable chance)

• Smart stronghold detection system

• Full configuration support with reload command

• Debug mode for troubleshooting

• bStats integration (can be disabled)

• International support with English messages

🎯 Perfect for:

• Survival servers wanting more balanced totem mechanics

• Hardcore servers increasing difficulty

• Adventure servers encouraging exploration

• Economy servers making totems more valuable

Commands: 

/totemtweak reload, /totemtweak help

Permissions: 

totemtweak.admin, totemtweak.reload

Configuration: Fully customizable via config.yml and messages.yml

Requirements: Minecraft 1.21+, Java 21+, Spigot/Paper

Transform your server's totem mechanics today! 🏰⚔️
